programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte continue restoration work on the homesteads manure shed, but there are concerns Otto may be pushing himself too hard, potentially straining his hernia

programme.title: Edge of Alaska

programme.title: Alaska Monsters

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers put their own, distinctive spin on the traditional Secret Santa gift exchange, preparing hand-made tools for their relatives - including a crossbow and explosives

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson creates a climbers haven for an arboreal couple whose love of trees rivals his own. The design features 17ft high ceilings and open-frame timber rafters

programme.desc: A group of rookies learns the ropes at Pennsylvania SPCAs Humane Law Enforcement, investigating cases of animal cruelty

programme.title: Fish or Die

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Trischa Price investigates a report of a sick horse, but is confused when she finds discarded hypodermic needles nearby

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Investigators rescue a 25-year-old chimpanzee living alone in a cage at his owners house

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia, Tania and Mariah take a look back at the most adorable moments - from surprising rescues and teary reunions to parolee antics and heart-warming adoptions

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy deals with a cat that is seemingly trying to destroy its owners love life

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: From the moment Leslie moved into her boyfriend Davids home, Fifi the cat rejected her. Jackson Galaxy tries to make the feline more welcoming

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Springtime proves busy for the wardens. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property and a fisherman is caught illegally catching oysters

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog needs emergency treatment after being shot in a home invasion. Dr Jeff and Hector treat wolves at a Colorado wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson designs a hideaway for a writer to embrace her creativity, transforming an old cedar tree into a gold-leafed retreat filled with uplifting oddities

programme.title: 100 Days Wild
programme.desc: Jennifer and Andrew welcome new members to their nomadic community, and cameras follow how well they adapt to a hunter-gatherer life in Alaskas Tanana Valley

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: After years of procrastination, Otto goes under the knife and while Charlotte waits, Jane is left to take care of the farm and delivers her first calf alone

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: A broken-down bulldozer sends Jeremy on an airborne cross-country mission, and Jenny finds herself facing off with a fierce predator as she is stalked in the wild by a wolf

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: The team heads deep into the Alaskan Interior outside of Fairbanks to investigate reports of a gigantic bear-like creature known as the Northern Giant

programme.title: Catfishin Kings
programme.desc: Following expert hand-fishers as they compete in a cross-state catfish-grabbing tournament, hosted by Brady Knowlton

programme.title: Speed of Life
programme.desc: Super-slow motion cameras capture the 100mph strike of a yellow eyelash viper, a howler monkeys evasion of predators, and a lizard that can walk on water

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson tackles a build for a couple searching for treehouse treasure, featuring a rope bridge and hidden compartments

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Investigator Mark rescues a dog with open wounds from a crate and firefighters try to reach a cat stuck 40ft up a palm tree in fierce winds

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: As summer arrives, temperatures soar to more than 100 degrees. Mark rescues a skinny Rottweiler chained out in the sun and investigators seek out kittens trapped under roof tiles

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Sun
programme.desc: Using satellite images and the expertise of Britains leading solar scientists, Kate Humble and Helen Czerski investigate the inner workings of the star and the influence its cycles of activity have on Earth. They reveal the sun is more active now than it has been for a decade, sending out super-heated plasma and waves of radiation, and examine why some experts think longer-term changes in its behaviour may have powerful effects on the worlds climate

programme.title: Timewatch
programme.desc: The history of the Empire State Building, commissioned by General Motors as a rival to the Chrysler Building, with personal accounts from a steelworker involved in its construction and, in a story which remarkably mirrors the tragic events of September 11, a widow whose husband died in 1945 when his plane crashed into the 79th floor. The programme also explores the life of public relations king Al Smith, the former governor of New York who once represented the public face of the impressive building, the worlds tallest for 40 years

programme.title: Inside Chernobyls Mega Tomb
programme.desc: Documentary following the construction of a 36,000 tonne steel structure to entomb the ruins of the nuclear power plant destroyed in the 1986 disaster. A team of international engineers race to build the new steel structure, but radiation levels make it almost impossible for workers to build right on top of the old reactor. The team face difficult challenges as they attempt to erect this new steel mega-structure and move it into place

programme.title: Pubs, Ponds and Power: The Story of the Village
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson explores the history of the Northumberland village of Warkworth. With the help of locals he discovers clues that point back almost 1,000 years to the Norman conquest, revealing how the invaders laid the foundations of a planned community still visible to this day

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out on the last leg of his journey across central England. While crossing an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon, the narrowboat enthusiast gets stuck in a lock in the heart of Birmingham. First broadcast 9 December 2020

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (1974)
programme.desc: An American businessman travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris tries to hire Hercule Poirot to discover the source of the death threats that have been made against him. The sleuth refuses, but wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow - and there is no shortage of suspects among the passengers. Agatha Christie mystery, starring Albert Finney, Lauren Bacall, Ingrid Bergman, Sean Connery and Vanessa Redgrave

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A retrospective look at TV appearances made over the years by award-winning actor Albert Finney, with interviews from the archive and classic clips capturing the milestones and highlights of his life and career. Narrated by Sylvia Syms

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of women during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wildes comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances OConnor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Sad Songs at the BBC
programme.desc: A journey through a selection of some of the saddest - but finest - songs from the BBCs music archives, with tear-jerkers from Paul McCartney, Kate Bush, the Smiths, Randy Crawford, Coldplay, Dolly Parton, Eric Clapton and Eric Carmen

programme.title: The Riviera: A History in Pictures
programme.desc: Richard E Grant concludes his exploration of the French Rivieras artistic legacy by focusing on how art and celebrity became intertwined in the early part of the 20th century. Resident artists such as Picasso and Matisse found the sun-drenched landscape ideal for experimenting with their work, and as the region became a creative hub, the likes of novelist Jean Cocteau and ballet impresario Sergei Diaghilev were drawn to the area. This artistic community also liked to party on the Cote dAzurs beaches - a pastime that proved equally irresistible to the American multimillionaires arriving in the area on board transatlantic liners

programme.title: The Jet Stream and Us
programme.desc: Documentary examining the influence that the jet stream - a ribbon of fast-moving air high up in the atmosphere - has on everyday weather. Here, scientists explain the effects the phenomenon has had on climate and discuss what could happen should it change its pattern of behaviour

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on September 24, 1999. Featuring Vengaboys, Sting, Everything but the Girl, Paul Johnson, Wyclef Jean and Bono, David Bowie, Tom Jones and The Cardigans and Eiffel 65

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents a roadshow edition of the pop chart programme, first broadcast on October 1, 1999. Featuring DJ Jean, Shania Twain, Kelle Bryan, David Bowie, S Club 7, Britney Spears, Lou Bega and Eiffel 65.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gary Davies and Nicky Campbell introduce the edition from April 24, featuring Pat and Mick, James Brown, Fairground Attraction, Brenda Russell, the Primitives, Luther Vandross, Joyce Sims, Bananarama, Will Downing, SExpress and Scott Fitzgerald

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Nicky Campbell presents the edition first aired on April 25 1991, featuring performances by EMF, De La Soul, Vic Reeves and the Roman Numerals, Electronic, Blur, Gloria Estefan, Chesney Hawkes and Quadrophonia

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don is busy this week, as the garden bursts into colour. Woody herbs such as thyme and sage dont thrive in his clay soil, so hes sowing seeds to ensure a steady supply. Carol Klein is creating a modest border devoted to vegetables and weaving it together with flowers, to provide year round colour. Also, Advolly Richmond heads to Fife to uncover the story of the first pink cupped daffodil, bred in the early 1900s and still growing today, thanks to two passionate plantswomen

programme.title: Dusty Springfield at the BBC
programme.desc: A selection of archive appearances on the BBC by singer Dusty Springfield through the decades, including performances of You Dont Have to Say You Love Me, Son of a Preacher Man and The Look of Love.

programme.title: Dusty Springfield at the BBC
programme.desc: A tribute to the renowned London-born pop diva, featuring BBC archive footage of some of Dustys most famous performances from 1961 to 1995. The programme also offers a chance to relive the singers story, from her folk beginnings with the Springfields, through to her Motown homage years and her collaboration with Pet Shop Boys in the late 1980s. Also includes the stars duets with Tom Jones and Mel Torme

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs chairs the old-time music hall programme, inviting Bernard Cribbins, Sandie Shaw, Bill McCue and Francis Van Dyke to entertain an audience at the Leeds City Varieties. First shown in April 1973

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The sleuth tries to help when a woman distracted by her mobile phone inadvertently causes a car crash and the other driver is so overcome by road rage she assaults her. Hetty tries to fix the missing pieces of the puzzle into place and uncovers a family tragedy

programme.title: Dusty Springfield at the BBC
programme.desc: A selection of archive appearances on the BBC by singer Dusty Springfield through the decades, including performances of You Dont Have to Say You Love Me, Son of a Preacher Man and The Look of Love.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on September 24, 1999. Featuring Vengaboys, Sting, Everything but the Girl, Paul Johnson, Wyclef Jean and Bono, David Bowie, Tom Jones and The Cardigans and Eiffel 65

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents a roadshow edition of the pop chart programme, first broadcast on October 1, 1999. Featuring DJ Jean, Shania Twain, Kelle Bryan, David Bowie, S Club 7, Britney Spears, Lou Bega and Eiffel 65.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gary Davies and Nicky Campbell introduce the edition from April 24, featuring Pat and Mick, James Brown, Fairground Attraction, Brenda Russell, the Primitives, Luther Vandross, Joyce Sims, Bananarama, Will Downing, SExpress and Scott Fitzgerald

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: A panel of BBC journalists hosts round-up from Westminster, delivering the usual mix of serious analysis and light-hearted gossip about the biggest stories in politics

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.sub-title: Fraudster Cashed in My Tax Rebate Cheque
programme.desc: The team meet the 20-year-old who was waiting to receive a tax rebate from HMRC, only to discover someone else had cashed the cheque weeks earlier. A fraud lawyer is on hand to explain what went wrong. Plus, a man who was targeted by scammers after using social media to complain about missing Christmas presents that hed ordered

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Derby to see a plot of land, and finds a whole family getting involved in building a new house. A separate family project in Lowestoft, Suffolk, sees an auntie and nephew tackle a tired terrace, and in another Suffolk property, Jacqui Joseph meets a novice renovator more used to dealing with cuts of meat than knocking down wallsTR

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The teams scour an antiques centre in the Derbyshire town of Heanor, where Natasha Raskin Sharp also meets Dawn Austin, who boasts a collection of more than 800 Barbie dolls. She learns that some vintage models are worth thousands, but does a first edition Ken doll command the same price as an early Barbie?

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: Joanna Page heads to the seaside resort of Eastbourne, and meets siblings David and Theresa. They battle to raise money for the charity DKMS, gambling on designer fashion, vintage finds and bold upcycled pieces

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: Banjo Beale and his team are in South Uist in the Outer Hebrides, theyve been called in to help crofters DJ and Lindsay, whose family have lived and worked the land there for generations. The couple want to turn their empty garage into a shop to sell their produce from. Banjo searches for salvage around the island and from DJs crofter mum

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A young couple want to swap their London flat for something bigger in the East Midlands, where Nicki Chapman opens the front doors to a selection of homes with charming gardens. Nicki cant miss the opportunity to meet another young couple whove already made their escape to develop a luxury leather goods business

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Having spent several years trying to earn a living from pyrography, Chantal feels its her last chance to make her craft pay. After having to give up her sugar-craft shop following a 33-year career, Claire needs to find a new way of earning a living and has her sights set on a new stained-glass business to pay the bills. They both seek advice on how to turn their hobbies into viable careers from Dom Chinea and his team of experts and then have two months to take on board all the tips offered to turn their passions into paying professions

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Family members Conn, Paula, Brian and Sophia take part. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies. Ross Kemp hosts

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the brainy quiz where the contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Albert Square comes together to celebrate a friend, Phil battles his inner demons, while Max and Cindys romance causes friction

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: Its the halfway point in the race to Mongolia, and after traversing Italy, Greece, and Turkiye, the teams now face the longest leg of the race so far. As they travel through the worlds largest landlocked country, Kazakhstan, and into Uzbekistan, they must navigate the vast Kazakh steppe with its endless horizons and limited English speakers. To keep moving, the pairs have to adapt to a whole new way of travelling. From the shores of the Caspian Sea in Aktau, the racers must embark on a 2,200km journey to Zaamin National Park in the Turkistan Mountains. John Hannah narrates

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: The second quarter-final is here, and the six best cooks of the week return to prove they have more culinary skill left in the tank. To warm things up, theres an invention test with a seasonal theme. Judges Anna Haugh and Grace Dent would like the amateurs to prepare a dish based on either spring or autumn

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers presents a review of the weeks political news, including reports on the latest events at Stormont and Westminster. Plus, comment and analysis with studio guests

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents topical debate from Maidenhead, with a panel of politicians and other guests facing questions from the audience

programme.title: St Denis Medical
programme.desc: Bruce is attacked in the car park. Joyce cant find the money needed to improve security, so Alex takes matters into her own hands. Ron doesnt believe Serena could beat him in a fight

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.sub-title: Holidays: Our Flight Took Off While Board Said Please Wait
programme.desc: The team ask whether airport information boards can be trusted, hearing from one group of passengers who waited patiently in the departure lounge for a delayed flight, only to find out it had taken off without them. Plus, an investigation into whether travel companies are following the rules designed to protect people whose package holidays go wrong

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A one-bedroom flat in London with a potential value of £1 million, 25 acres of land in Anglesey and a two-bedroom flat in Bristol. Presented by Martin Roberts and Martel Maxwell

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: At a Wetherby racecourse antiques fair in West Yorkshire, two teams look for lucrative items at an antiques fair. In red are sisters Sharon and Hayley, with their expert Charles Hanson. On the blue team, brothers Harley and Joe are paired with expert Philip Serrell. Danny Sebastian hosts

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Rock n roll reaches Kembleford when a group of bikers causes outrage and excitement in equal measure. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Steve Brown is on hand to help a couple of newlyweds looking to escape south London and find their first home together in the countryside of Cumbria

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: After leaving teaching, Clare turned to metalwork and retrained as a blacksmith. Having just finished her studies, she needs to start making money so that she and her partner can save up a deposit for their first home. Orchestra box office manager Gavin, who currently lives with his mother, wants his own place with more space for him and his equipment. They both seek advice on how to turn their hobbies into viable careers from Dom Chinea and his team of experts

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a special edition of the high stakes quiz, with soap veterans playing to win money for their chosen charities. Former Coronation Street star Faye Brookes, Hollyoaks Richard Blackwood, Natalie Anderson from Emmerdale, and ex-EastEnder John Partridge must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truth steps and avoiding the lies, earning money for each correct answer

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the brainy quiz where the contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Clara Amfo and Alex Jones present the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.desc: Featuring two sisters who share an extraordinary bond as one donated her womb to the other to enable her to give birth, making British medical history. Bill Bailey pairs Grace and Amy with Karen Turner, an award-winning artist with a powerful commitment to telling womens stories

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Its Humphreys last day as detective inspector, and the whole team is eagerly awaiting the towns annual pirate festival. Danger, however, is ahoy when Geraldine Desais nautical exhibition goes up in smoke, leading to the ancient treasure map of pirate Elias Cutler going missing amid the chaos. On the trail of the missing map, Humphrey soon has suspicions when he discovers that Geraldine has been selling her memorabilia to pay for her husbands care and recently had the map revalued. Drama, starring Kris Marshall

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade hosts, with actor and comedian Stephen Mangan and journalist Ava Santina Evans joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop as they delve into the news

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Mairead and the lads take the family car on a road trip to pick up her unpredictable mother, but disaster strikes. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy, Chris Walley and Hilary Rose

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: Bikes!
programme.desc: Stephen Watson presents action from the first road racing event of the year - Irelands oldest road race. Riders and fans from all around the world gather as the participants negotiated laps of the 2.1-mile Orritor Circuit, which has been won by the likes of Michael Dunlop, Philip McCallen and Ryan Farquhar

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Sun and sand are the new dream, but the lads cannot afford it, until Billy Murphy turns up with a daring heist idea. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy, Chris Walley and Shane Casey

programme.title: St Denis Medical
programme.desc: Joyce suddenly needs to redecorate the new maternity unit, Alex is back from holiday in Hawaii, and Serena doesnt take it well when she finds out Matt asked to work separately from her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and David Alan Grier

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: Charles is off to a bumpy start, and Olivia is left speechless after meeting her latest match. Meanwhile, Nirvali debriefs with her family, and Dianne gets a pep talk from her mum

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: A phone call sets Olivias heart racing, Charles gets back on the horse, and Nirvali opens up. Meanwhile, 20-year-old Liv has her wedding planned but needs to find her groom

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Invited into the traditionally private gypsy community, Stacey discovers the complex balancing act young women face growing up in one of Britains most maligned ethnic minorities. In Bedfordshire she meets 23-year-old Chantelle, who prides herself in keeping with the old gypsy values her grandmother taught her and shares them on social media, where she has nearly 400,000 TikTok followers. In Lincolnshire, the reporter meets 18-year-old Serena, who is planning her wedding to her fiance Marco. He is also from a gypsy and traveller community and Serena wouldnt have it any other way

programme.title: Fake Friend: The Ticket Scammer
programme.desc: The case of a Somerset high-flyer who turned his charm and connections into tools of deception, conning his friends and hundreds of others, while living a life of glamour himself. Through the voices of his victims and event industry insiders, this documentary uncovers the high personal and financial cost of chasing exclusivity, and how easily even the most cautious can be deceived

programme.title: The Idaho Murders: Trial by TikTok
programme.desc: Zara McDermott visits Moscow, Idaho to uncover the story of the social media frenzy that followed the murders of four Idaho University students. She meets with online true crime sleuths building their own theories about the murders and those who were personally affected by the social media storm as she reflects on her own role in the tragedy and learns more about obsessive online consumption of true crime

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the oceans that surround the continents coastline, which are home to more than 60 per cent of the worlds marine species. Featuring footage of reef fish, manta rays, and a juvenile sperm whale, as well as the whirlpools that form in the Indonesian Throughflow. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Freddie Flintoffs Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After transforming the lives of a group of teenage boys and a cricket club in his home town of Preston, former England captain and TV presenter Freddie Flintoff takes his team on a cricket tour in one of the most revered cricketing nations in the world, India. Originally planned for 2022, the trip was put on hold after a life-changing accident that threatened to put a halt to the teams dreams

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Karan Johar greets 20 players as they enter a grand palace to play the game of trust and betrayal. As the traitors and innocents vie for the prize of 10 million rupees, an early twist sets alliances and rivalries in motion, and in the first mission, the players solve riddles aboard a moving train to avert disaster - putting their teamwork and quick thinking to the ultimate test

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Tensions rise as the players grapple with the aftermath of a shocking murder. The air is heavy with mistrust as they prepare for a mission designed to test their ability to work together despite growing fractures. At the Circle of Shaq, the innocents get their first opportunity to strike back and expose the traitors. Accusations run wild and alliances shift as the group struggles to separate truth from deception

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The contestants take on a gruelling mission which will grant one person a coveted shield - the only protection against murder. Presenter Karan Johar then presents the players with a shocking twist in the form of a blast from the past - forcing the group to re-evaluate everything they thought they knew

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Dickie concocts an absolutely amazing murder mystery evening, full of twists and turns. Solving the murder should be easy - providing he can keep it all on track. Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell, Patsy Lowe and Elijah Young

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: The story of Kilmarnock nurse Adele Rennie, who pretended to be handsome, professional men to target, harass, stalk and exploit hundreds of women. When Dr David Graham starts flirting with former beauty queen Abbie Draper online, she turns sleuth and uncovers a trail of deception, crazy coincidences and stories that just dont add up

programme.title: Matthew Perry and the Ketamine Queen
programme.desc: Amber Haque explores the relationship between the Friends actor and Los Angeles-based drug dealer and dual US-UK citizen Jasveen Sangha - dubbed the Ketamine Queen by US prosecutors - who was one of five people charged in connection with Perrys untimely death, including two doctors and Perrys personal assistant. She pleaded guilty to five federal counts, including one of distributing ketamine resulting in death

programme.title: Fake Friend: The Ticket Scammer
programme.desc: The case of a Somerset high-flyer who turned his charm and connections into tools of deception, conning his friends and hundreds of others, while living a life of glamour himself. Through the voices of his victims and event industry insiders, this documentary uncovers the high personal and financial cost of chasing exclusivity, and how easily even the most cautious can be deceived

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Brothers Steve and Stu scramble to put on a last-minute birthday show for Steves daughter. If they fail, Steves in the doghouse and Stu might end up dead. Comic short film, written by and starring Stuart McPherson and Stephen Buchanan

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Animated comedy set in 1990s east London. Joyces birthday present has been stolen, so her husband enlists the help of his fearsome mother-in-law to track it down

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall heads to Zambia, where he hears hippo communication on a whole new level, spots a high-diving crocodile and meets some incredible sniffer dogs

programme.title: Despicable Me 2 (2013)
programme.desc: A reformed criminal mastermind who has abandoned his wicked ways for a life of fatherhood and jam-making helps a secret agent to bring one of his fellow evil geniuses to justice. The villain in question has stolen a dangerous experimental serum with the power to turn harmless animals into ravening monsters. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Steve Carell and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Marlon is overjoyed when his sister is offered a scholarship at a prestigious school in Jamaica. But the celebrations are cut short when the officer receives a call from his old boss, claiming he has been hurt - only for things to turn violent. Meanwhile, Nevilles flirty conversations with blog-fan Sunset Chaser are progressing nicely, but stall when he requests to see a photo

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: Janie is tasked with solving the murder of the best man the night before a wedding. As she uncovers complicated family dynamics and betrayed friendships. she is forced to face up to her personal experience of a friendship turned sour to connect with a suspect. Meanwhile, John forms an unlikely connection with one of the suspects over art, forcing him to re-evaluate the role that work played in his own marriage. Guest starring Kiell Smith-Bynoe

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: Janie investigates the murder of an am-dram theatre director. She enlists Johns help, and he takes matters into his own hands and joins the cast of the theatre groups next play. He finds himself unexpectedly reminded of why he fell in love with acting in the first place, while a downtrodden suspect standing up for themselves inspires Janie to confront her own demons from the past

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Everyone boards the Teesside Princess for Mams Titanic-themed drag brunch. However, the event hits a proverbial iceberg when Mam is faced with an unwelcome blast from her past. Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell, Patsy Lowe and Elijah Young

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny makes a startling discovery about Corinthians parentage, while Janet and Donna argue when they both become convinced they will get the job managing the Archer. Sitcom, starring Ralf Little, Natalie Casey and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet starts her job managing the Archer and, in a bid to attract an older clientele, decides to give the pub a wartime theme. Donna is still intent on revenge, Jonny helps Gaz become a dad and Louise turns to prostitution. Comedy, starring Sheridan Smith and Natalie Casey

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: Abbie Draper takes her findings to the police, but they are unable to do anything about it and the Catfish of Kilmarnock remains free to target more and more victims. However, Abbie cannot walk away and steps up her investigation over months that turn into years, with victims spread across the country and dating back over a decade

programme.title: The Beauty Queen and the Catfish
programme.desc: The victims finally have justice, but are still left urgently searching for answers. What drives someone, with a seemingly normal life to terrorise countless women from the same town? Those closest to the perpetrator, who are also trying to understand the mystery behind the repeated cycles of offending, share their thoughts

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Invited into the traditionally private gypsy community, Stacey discovers the complex balancing act young women face growing up in one of Britains most maligned ethnic minorities. In Bedfordshire she meets 23-year-old Chantelle, who prides herself in keeping with the old gypsy values her grandmother taught her and shares them on social media, where she has nearly 400,000 TikTok followers. In Lincolnshire, the reporter meets 18-year-old Serena, who is planning her wedding to her fiance Marco. He is also from a gypsy and traveller community and Serena wouldnt have it any other way

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: When a teenage boy has a girl over for the first time, the overly attached monster under his bed has a meltdown. Comedy short film, starring Freddie Meredith

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Grace Dent and Anna Haugh put six more amateurs, including a tattoo artist, a flight operations controller and a retired US diplomat, through their paces in the MasterChef kitchen, asking each one to serve up their signature dish and follow a recipe that has key information missing. Those who make it through the first two rounds cook once more, before the next two quarter-finalists are decided

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Esther are left baffled when a dogwalker leads them to a man painted green and bound with ivy. Delving into the mystery of the mythical Green Man, the team discover an off-grid community living off the land. But when their woodland home comes under threat from a developer from the city, tensions rise and accusations fly as the image of the Green Man continues to crop up at crime scenes. Cosy crime drama, starring Kris Marshall

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: The pilgrims are in the Scottish Borders on St Cuthberts Way in the Cheviots. It takes them on a strenuous route up Wideopen Hill to reach some spectacular views. Later, they head to Cuthberts Cave, in the Kelso Hills, and on the last day of their pilgrimage they follow the 5km walk across the tidal sands of the Pilgrims Way. Finally, they arrive at Holy Island and reflect on their journey

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: After viewing more than 200 houses, a couple from the city of Sheffield are hopeful that Cornwall will finally deliver their dream countryside home, with enough space for their extensive collection of books and film memorabilia. . Briony May Williams takes on the challenge

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: Best friends and former Traitors stars Sonja and Aubrey travel to Harrogate, where they scour the the North Yorkshire towns 17 charity shops to raise money for a local cat sanctuary. Sonia adopts a disciplined approach, focusing on timeless, high-quality fabrics and classic tailoring, while Aubrey leans into bold style and personality - although presenter Joanna Page worries he may be falling into a common thrifting trap - choosing pieces he loves personally rather than thinking purely about profit

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads north from Tokyo to Honshus Tohoku region, known as the rice granary of Japan. In the city of Sendai, he learns about the disaster of the 2011 earthquake and tsunami. Further up the coast at the fishing port of Shiogama, Michael attends the daily tuna auction and watches as bidders compete for the prized fish, with the largest fetching almost £1,900

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don adds a dash of Mediterranean flair and flavour by planting lemons in pots. Hes also planting in the woodland garden and potting up summer bulbs. Sue Kent sows tender crops, Jamie Butterworth pays tribute to the humble euphorbia and garden designer Rosemary Alexander showcases her private garden

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The latest stories from Westminster and beyond

programme.title: Snooker: The World Championship
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal presents live coverage of the afternoon session on day 13 at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, featuring the opening eight frames of the first semi-final. Ronnie OSullivan played in a record-extending 14th semi-final last year, and he was tied 4-4 with Zhao Xintong at the end of the opening session. With commentary and analysis from Steve Davis, Ken Doherty, Steven Hallworth, Stephen Hendry, John Parrott, Joe Perry, Dennis Taylor and Lee Walker

programme.title: The Best Dishes Ever
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott introduces recipes that can be prepared quickly, including Nigel Slaters herb butter squid, James Martins icebox cake and Mary Berrys chocolate tray bake

programme.title: Natural World
programme.sub-title: Forest Elephants: Rumbles in the Jungle
programme.desc: Scientist Andrea Turkalo examines the social bonds formed by elephants deep in the rainforests of central Africa. After more than 20 years of field study, she has begun to unravel the secrets of the animals lives and the meanings of the sounds they use to communicate with each other. Richard Armitage narrates

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Antique experts Catherine Southon and Jonathan Pratt search for items in Kent to take off to auction. Catherine falls for a colourful brooch and Jonathan unearths a horn beaker used by Winston Churchill. Host Paul Martin uncovers the story of Dover Castles secret tunnels

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Kelle Bryan, Antony Costa, Alexei Sayle and Emma Sidi test their general knowledge skills in the penultimate round of challenges

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos bullet train takes him through the undersea Seikan tunnel to Hokkaido, the most northerly of Japans main islands and home to the indigenous Ainu people. He begins by exploring the southern city of Hakodate, one of the ports which was first to trade with the outside world

programme.title: Snooker: The World Championship
programme.desc: Hazel Irvine presents live coverage of the evening session on day 13 at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, featuring the opening eight frames of the second semi-final. Mark Williams became the oldest player to appear in the last four of this competition since Ray Reardon in 1985 when he faced Judd Trump last year, but it was The Juddernaut who lead 5-3 at the end of the opening session following a century in the final frame. With commentary and analysis from Steve Davis, Ken Doherty, Steven Hallworth, Stephen Hendry, John Parrott, Joe Perry, Dennis Taylor and Lee Walker

programme.desc: Stephen Nolan joins officers from the Police Service of Northern Ireland as they patrol the streets of Belfast. Dave stumbles upon a drug den. Jade and Adam open up about the mental health scars of being a Peeler and Perri uses pepper spray to bring a violent suspect down

programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Paddy OConnell

programme.title: On the Basis of Sex (2018)
programme.desc: Biopic of lawyer Ruth Bader Ginsburg showing how she faced adversity and numerous obstacles in her fight for equal rights throughout her career, which culminated in her becoming a member of the Supreme Court of the United States. Starring Felicity Jones, with Armie Hammer, Justin Theroux and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Panorama
programme.sub-title: Antisemitism: Why British Jews Are Afraid - Panorama
programme.desc: In-depth current affairs report covering a story behind the headlines

programme.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
programme.desc: Following Michael Jackson from the shockwaves of the Martin Bashir documentary Living with Michael Jackson to the final act of his life - and the battle over what he leaves behind. In the aftermath of the documentary, insiders describe a man in free-fall - frightened, financially exposed and increasingly isolated. Manager Dieter Wiesner recalls Michael rallying his fanbase, while rumours of mounting debts and allegations escalate

programme.title: Artemis: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The inside story of Nasas mission around the Moon and back, with astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch and Jeremy Hansen having gones deeper into space than anyone has gone before. For the past three-and-a-half years, this Horizon special has had privileged access inside Nasa to chronicle the mission, hearing from astronauts, engineers, technicians and mission directors about what it takes to mount a moonshot in the 21st century. There are further insights from some of the biggest names in space science including Maggie Aderin and British astronaut Tim peake

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Ben Cooper and Gary Pe assist the teams at an antiques centre near Exeter, and Christina Trevanion meets a museum curator with a collection of shipwrecked Lego pieces

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: Joanna Page presents a thrifting showdown in Abergavenny, as partners Claudia and Luke face off to raise money for the British Heart Foundation. With £100 each and just 60 minutes on the clock, theyre paired with expert thrifters and sent racing around the local charity shops. Luke dives straight in, snapping up a 1970s leather writing case and later taking punts on a brass Japanese telescope and vintage Dandy comics. Claudia, meanwhile, picks up a sheepskin jacket and other carefully chosen fashion pieces

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos bullet train takes him through the undersea Seikan tunnel to Hokkaido, the most northerly of Japans main islands and home to the indigenous Ainu people. He begins by exploring the southern city of Hakodate, one of the ports which was first to trade with the outside world

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball reveals how cutting smartphone use to just two hours a day can aid wellbeing, offering a busy beautician in Kettering some clever digital detox tricks

They get to grips with a traditional loom before Ronan heads for Sligo to meet up with a fellow boyband veteran, Shane Filan of Westlife, for some horse riding on the golden sands of Strandhill Beach

With commentary and analysis from Steve Davis, Ken Doherty, Steven Hallworth, Stephen Hendry, John Parrott, Joe Perry, Dennis Taylor and Lee Walker

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Appeal on behalf of Action for ME, a charity that provides support and advocacy to people affected by ME, while looking to create positive change through medical research

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Examining how animals, including monkeys, wolves, bears, foxes and birds, cope with mountain life in the Himalayas, and how the harsh terrain has given many creatures remarkable strength. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts a quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions in a bid to win a jackpot of £3,000

programme.title: Snooker: The World Championship
programme.desc: Hazel Irvine presents live coverage of the afternoon session on day 14 at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, featuring session two of the second semi-final. With commentary and analysis from Steve Davis, Ken Doherty, Steven Hallworth, Stephen Hendry, John Parrott, Joe Perry, Dennis Taylor and Lee Walker

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Kelle Bryan, Antony Costa, Alexei Sayle and Emma Sidi test their general knowledge skills in the final round of challenges before Richard Osman announces the winner

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his Japanese adventure, Michael Portillo explores the history of Hokkaidos indigenous Ainu people. Travelling east to the Iburi region, an area closely associated with Ainu culture, he visits Lake Shikotsu. Over a traditional meal of salmon soup on the lake shore, he learns about the beliefs and values of the Ainu and how they were forced to assimilate to Japanese society following Hokkaidos colonisation

programme.title: Snooker: The World Championship
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal presents live coverage of the evening session on day 14 at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, featuring the third and penultimate session of the first semi-final. Eventual champion Zhao Xintong wrapped up a stunning 17-7 victory over Ronnie OSullivan at this stage last year to become only the second man, after John Parrott in 1994, to defeat The Rocket with a session to spare. With commentary and analysis from Steve Davis, Ken Doherty, Steven Hallworth, Stephen Hendry, John Parrott, Joe Perry, Dennis Taylor and Lee Walker

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Jamali Maddix, Sindhu Vee, Fern Brady

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brothers funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne

programme.title: Black Box (2021)
programme.desc: Obsessive forensic analyst Mathieu Vasseur is disappointed to be sidelined in the examination of the black box of an airliner which has mysteriously crashed in the Alps. Then Jay Rayner arrives to set them a brief - and all he asks for is a salad, which is easier said than done. Whose bowl will be good enough to see them through to knockout week?

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: Alan and interiors guru Michelle Ogundehin welcome a new group of wannabe designers to the Brighton Design Studio, where each week they are challenged to transform a selection of vastly different spaces. To judge their efforts, Michelle is joined by leading designer Jonathan Adler

programme.title: Mastermind: To Think Like a Killer

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Forty-two-year-old logistics manager Luke from Chichester is back in the UK after seven years working in the Middle East and is looking for a woman to reinvigorate his love life. Thirty-five-year-old amateur pole dancer Abi from Colchester is looking for fun times with someone silly who can send her heart into a spin

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Nicolle and Bens next leap into non-monogamy is to try a couple swap. However, as the residents warm up for a sexually charged rendezvous in the retreats cloisters, social anxiety kicks in for a teary Nicolle. As she works through her nerves, a flirty evening with resident married couple Gage and Olivia leads to the bedroom. As the lights are dimmed, it remains to be seen whether Nicolles insecurities will re-emerge. Meanwhile, engaged couple Katey and Dan plan a night of sexual fun with residents Josh and Holly

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of November 6, 1956, the final day of the Suez Crisis. British troops are in Egypt supposedly on a peace-keeping mission, to protect the Suez Canal. But all is not as it seems. Nobody knows it, but the next 24 hours will change Britain for ever and determine the future shape of the world, told hour by hour, minute by minute through the eyes of historians and those at the heart of Government

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The documentary reports from the US state of Minnesota, where a recent surge in immigration raids has left children traumatised across the city of Minneapolis. Paul McNamara investigates the lasting impact on children and also on whole families still living in fear

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from north London and Hertfordshire compete for the cash prize of £1,000 as they take turns to host dinner parties. Dawn and Simon, who have been married for nearly 30 years, hipsters Darren and Sian, and lawyer Ayesha and astrophysicist Stephen battle it out to win the dinner party challenge

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Tim and Emily fell in love with their 16th-century, Grade II-listed Cotswold cottage on first viewing, despite an abundance of dark beams, low ceilings and woodchip. For George, the project is his oldest house yet. And In Kent he tackles an oast house. Can he design a super cool bedroom for eight-year-old Bella in this unusual tower?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm suspects Vera is being unfaithful with a neighbour, while Diane is incensed by the way that Sam refers to her during a radio interview. Comedy, starring Ted Danson, Shelley Long and George Wendt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset at Rays reaction to a friends breast enlargement, and decides to play a trick on him to see if he really is happy with her body the way it is. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: Frank shows an uncharacteristic interest in Rays work, but proves to have an ulterior motive. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A journalist devotes a newspaper column to criticising Frasier, who responds in kind, triggering off a full-scale feud between the pair. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In France, Sophie and Will welcome new arrivals to their alpaca herd. In the Gironde region, gîte owners Simon and Cheryl trial their new guest activities. Meanwhile, it seems Yorkshire couple Brian and Shirley may be about to throw in the towel at their unique cave house bed and breakfast in Spain

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie battle brambles to create a riverside retreat. Louisa and Roger race to finish a new suite at Château de Montespieu with a few last-minute design changes. At Château Meaume near Bordeaux, Mark and Sandra scramble to ready their gîte for its very first guests - but with lighting unfinished and upcycling projects still under way, theres still plenty to do

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: The Rodriguez sisters Sophie and Charlotte help Karl and Penni, who are in Alicante to search for a sunny retreat from their life in Wales. In Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown are house hunting with Veronica, Harvey and teenage daughter Naomi, where finding a home to suit everyone proves a challenge

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: From the Lakes to Whitby, Paul traverses the north of England in the cabs of steam and diesel trains. He battles leaves on the line in a narrow-gauge steam locomotive and then switches to a steam-powered boat for a cruise on Windermere. After experiencing the luxury of Queen Victorias private carriage, he heads off to drive a 50-ton wartime steam locomotive and a historic hand-powered railway cart, and rides in the cab of a powerful diesel train to Dracula country

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joanna Page holds a sheep above her head, Amy Gledhill bursts a balloon and Kumail Nanjiani gives an ostrich some fangs. Armando Iannucci and Joel Dommett both find unusual substitutes for sweets and the normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by Taskmaster Greg Davies

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Its the day before Eddie and Whitney leave London to set up their commune in Devon. With little time to lose, Maggie and the gang have cooked up a fake spiritual conference, with Whitney as the keynote speaker, as a way to rescue Eddie from her fraudulent friend - but in classic Maggie fashion, things quickly escalate

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Maggie tries to put a broken Eddie back together by reminding her of all the good times theyve shared, so that they can get back to being best friends. They reminisce through flashbacks of their friendship, going back to Eddies dads wake in 2010 - the day they met. But while Maggie has always been there to brighten Eddies day, she also has a knack for ruining her important moments

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans brings his entertainment show back to Channel 4 in a more intimate format, featuring interviews with the biggest stars and music by the latest bands from the presenters studio at Virgin Radio UK

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Documentary following 12 adult virgins as they embark on a unique course in intimacy at a luxury retreat, to see if it can help them overcome the fears. The group meet for the first time and begin to unpack their deepest fears and anxieties. But with shame running deep and barriers high, can any of them open up and take the first step toward intimacy?

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Things are set to escalate as the group explore their core desires and lean into animal instincts. Berties readiness to fully embrace island life is called into question, Marianne works through deep-rooted issues of trust and some of the group take a significant step, beginning the most advanced form of therapy at the retreat - surrogate partner therapy

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun (2018)
programme.desc: Forrest Tucker, a criminal since the age of 15, has escaped from most of the prisons that tried to hold him. At the end of his career, he has become a gentleman bank robber. However, cop John Hunt becomes determined to catch him. Fact-based crime drama, starring the late Robert Redford, with Casey Affleck and Sissy Spacek

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: Part two of two. The inside story of November 6, 1956, the final day of the Suez Crisis. British troops are in Egypt supposedly on a peace-keeping mission, to protect the Suez Canal. But all is not as it seems. Nobody knows it, but the next 24 hours will change Britain for ever and determine the future shape of the world, told hour by hour, minute by minute through the eyes of historians and those at the heart of Government

programme.title: Guy Martin: Supervan
programme.desc: Guy takes a trip down memory lane to revisit his many adventures in his beloved Transit van. When Guys original Transit was written off in a surprisingly low speed run-in with a car transporter, Guy had custom engineers turn it into a supervan. Over the next few years, Guy would enter the Nevada Open Road Challenge, run the supervan to its limit at the Bonneville Salt Flats and head over to the Nurburgring in Germany in a bid for a world-beating best

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George gets to celebrate one of his favourite periods of British architecture when he helps out at an arts and crafts Edwardian terrace house in Addiscombe, south London. Cookie and Sophia bought their home six months ago, but, despite it being full to the brim with amazing original features, from fireplaces to balustrades and stained-glass windows, it needed some serious TLC. This renovation is a labour of love as the couple set about painstakingly restoring the features by themselves. George visits the wallpaper library of his all-time design hero William Morris, and tries his hand at block printing

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by the Rev Kate Bottley in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff is thrilled to meet his estranged father, but their reunion does not go to plan, and Sams date proves to be a bone of contention between him and Diane. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane writes a psychology paper and attempts to prove that her relationship with Sam is platonic. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody wins several weekly football pools at Cheers and decides to gamble everything on a large bet - but Sam tries to discourage him. Meanwhile, Frasier and Dianes constant bickering has the gang climbing the walls. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray make their wills, but struggle to pick guardians for the children. They finally manage to decide - but not everyone is happy about the arrangement. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset by her hippie sisters decision to become a nun, and resolves to prove her new-found faith is just a phase. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra upsets Ray by comparing him to his irritating cousin Gerard, so he sets out to seek reassurance from his family. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Fred Stoller

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin begins spying on a neighbour through his new telescope and eventually strikes up an acquaintance, much to the delight of Frasier, who does his best to encourage their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Horrified to learn he has unwittingly invested in a forged painting, Frasier considers his options - and decides to exact a suitable revenge on the dealers who sold it to him. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Having advised a caller to break up with his girlfriend, Frasier ends up dating her himself - and bends the rules of professional ethics to continue the relationship. Comedy, guest starring Amanda Donohoe

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is reunited with an old friend - and Niles and Frasier begin to suspect the pair may once have had an affair. However, the truth proves even more shocking. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Long Island, New York, to help an Indian restaurant which used to run a Mexican eatery out of the same kitchen. Its been operating for 35-years, but a decline in business led to fusion experiments, which havent always been successful and which have confused the customers. With some dishes tasting soggy and swimming with oil, Ramsay has his work cut out trying to turn things round

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole are in north Wales, where Simon attempts his craziest restoration yet, turning the carcass of an old Land Rover into a garden seat

programme.title: Matt Bakers Travels in the Country: USA
programme.desc: The journey concludes along the west coast of California where Matt learns about the unique growing conditions that make Castroville the artichoke capital of the world. He tries his hand at a different form of farming on Americas only ocean-based abalone farm. Further north in Salinas Valley, Matt helps with milking at the last family dairy farm on the coast that produces Monterey Jack cheese. He takes to the water to see a pod of grey whales before paying a visit to the tallest living things on earth, coastal redwood trees, which can grow to 380 feet tall and 29 feet wide

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by the Rev Kate Bottley in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe meets Gill and Rhys from Leicestershire. With Gill already retired and Rhys soon to follow, they are looking to fulfil their dream of leaving the UK and moving to Bergerac in the Dordogne countryside. Armed with a budget of £190,000, Craig tries to find the perfect property for them

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In France, Mark and Alison cook up a new idea at their BandB and fishing lake, hoping to bring in some extra income. In Portugal, good friends Russ and Brad make plans to expand their e-bike rental company. Meanwhile, Sussex couple Lindsay and Craig attempt to secure more bookings for their holiday villa in Granada

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jon and Carmen start work on their deluxe vineyard pergola, but Jons measurements go awry. Sarah and George scramble to transform a neglected pigeon house covered in droppings into a wedding focal point

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Steve Garner launch their biggest business move in a decade - a new branch on the Costa del Sol. Their first clients are Essex couple Helen and Peter, who are searching for a spacious forever home with great views. On the northern Costa Blanca, Jo and Andrew Alderton guide Caroline and David through a series of surprises, from a bungalow in Moraira to a townhouse packed with space and hidden extras

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is a critical front line in Americas war on drugs. As the US pours billions into military operations across the Caribbean - to seize the former President of Venezuela, and intercept drug shipments - federal agents on the island are stepping up raids against powerful gangs. Reporter Guillermo Galdos joins the Drug Enforcement Agency and police on high-risk operations in San Juan, where major arrests and drug seizures reveal the scale of the trade

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks
programme.desc: Comedian and presenter Alexander Armstrong explores some of Britains best and most spectacular pub walks. In the first episode, he is joined in Yorkshire by James May, who discusses memories from his childhood, getting repeatedly fired from jobs, his eventful Top Gear days and, under a tree in the grounds of Bolton Abbey, opens up about ageing and retirement

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Tall and confident army sergeant Paul is paired with Natalie, a former girl band member who usually goes for a very different kind of man. Will she fall for his charm? Kerry, a forensic psychologist, is on her first date since losing her hearing five years ago. She meets Dan, a gentle police officer, who may just be the kind of man she can open up to. And 80-something Dave is still chasing love after three divorces. He hopes his enthusiasm - and his love of weightlifting - will impress elegant widow Clare

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joanna Page holds a sheep above her head, Amy Gledhill bursts a balloon and Kumail Nanjiani gives an ostrich some fangs. Armando Iannucci and Joel Dommett both find unusual substitutes for sweets and the normally infallible Alex Horne makes a rare, condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by Taskmaster Greg Davies

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.sub-title: 2026 Miami Grand Prix Sprint Qualifying Highlights
programme.desc: Alex Jacques presents action from Miami International Autodrome in Florida, where the drivers battled for grid positions ahead of the sprint race at the fourth round of the season

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett heads to the Austro-German border with his guest vacationer Roisin Conaty, spending a couple of days in the fairy-tale city of Salzburg. After checking in to the art-filled Blaue Ganz hotel, they hop into a horse and carriage for a tour of the city and an on-the-go three-course meal. They then embark on a forest-bathing workshop, attempting a series of exercises to reawaken their senses. Day two starts with a homage to Mozart. The duo reflect on the composers music then sample the citys signature sweet, Mozartkulgen - aka Mozart Balls - a mix of nougat, marzipan and dark chocolate

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north London, Helen and her Albanian boyfriend David kick off the contest with their Greek menu. Their food goes down well with Sara and her Aussie husband Thierry, which is more than can be said for Davids views on womens roles within the home. On day two, Vicky and Geoff cook up an Italian menu, but their rock and pop idol dress code is a huge flop with one couple. The hosts face a grilling over food shortcuts, and Helen and Vicky go head to head in the battle of the cheesecakes. Finally, Sara and Thierry serve up the fashions and food of the 1980s. However, one guest makes a fashion faux pas about Saras favourite frock

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Documentary following 12 adult virgins as they embark on a unique course in intimacy at a luxury retreat, to see if it can help them overcome the fears. The group meet for the first time and begin to unpack their deepest fears and anxieties. But with shame running deep and barriers high, can any of them open up and take the first step toward intimacy?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of November 6, 1956, the final day of the Suez Crisis. British troops are in Egypt supposedly on a peace-keeping mission, to protect the Suez Canal. But all is not as it seems. Nobody knows it, but the next 24 hours will change Britain for ever and determine the future shape of the world, told hour by hour, minute by minute through the eyes of historians and those at the heart of Government

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The documentary reports from the US state of Minnesota, where a recent surge in immigration raids has left children traumatised across the city of Minneapolis. Paul McNamara investigates the lasting impact on children and also on whole families still living in fear

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from north London and Hertfordshire compete for the cash prize of £1,000 as they take turns to host dinner parties. Dawn and Simon, who have been married for nearly 30 years, hipsters Darren and Sian, and lawyer Ayesha and astrophysicist Stephen battle it out to win the dinner party challenge

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Tim and Emily fell in love with their 16th-century, Grade II-listed Cotswold cottage on first viewing, despite an abundance of dark beams, low ceilings and woodchip. For George, the project is his oldest house yet. And In Kent he tackles an oast house. Can he design a super cool bedroom for eight-year-old Bella in this unusual tower?

programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by the Rev Kate Bottley in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla places a lonely hearts ad, but receives no replies - so Sam and the bar-room regulars decide to boost her confidence by making one up. Classic comedy, starring Ted Danson, Shelley Long, Rhea Perlman, George Wendt, John Ratzenberger and Nicholas Colasanto

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm suspects Vera is being unfaithful with a neighbour, while Diane is incensed by the way that Sam refers to her during a radio interview. Comedy, starring Ted Danson, Shelley Long and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam drafts Woody onto the bowling team to play against Garys Olde Towne Tavern, only to discover all his regulars are hopelessly poor at the game - prompting Diane to step in and save the day for the Cheers gang. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset at Rays reaction to a friends breast enlargement, and decides to play a trick on him to see if he really is happy with her body the way it is. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Rays close encounter with Debras new can opener leads to a colossal argument between the couple - in which Marie, Frank and Robert cannot help getting involved. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank shows an uncharacteristic interest in Rays work, but proves to have an ulterior motive. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist abandons his bar-propping in Boston in favour of presenting a radio show in Seattle. However, his new life is thrown into upheaval when his father moves in with him - followed by apparently psychic care assistant Daphne. First-ever episode of the comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink resents his lack of privacy now that he has to share his apartment with his father and Daphne, while Roz debates the virtues of human contact. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier agree to eat at Martins favourite restaurant, but are not prepared for its laid-back atmosphere. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A journalist devotes a newspaper column to criticising Frasier, who responds in kind, triggering off a full-scale feud between the pair. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Maxs Bar and Grill. Even though its been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, its on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isnt helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together
