programme.desc: A woman returning from Lebanon may be carrying a deadly disease, and traces of an illicit substance on a smoking pipe could end the plans of an Italian traveller

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A nervous Vietnamese man is detained when traces of amphetamines are found on several suspicious bottles he is carrying, while another man is caught smuggling wildlife in his underpants. A British backpacker returns to Australia to collect his belongings but he refuses to answer Immigrations questions about his illegal past. Drug smugglers attempt to conceal a shipment inside jackhammers arriving from China

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Immigration suspect that an Indian man is trying to cross the border on a false French passport when they discover he has never even been to France

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Cdr Rikers duplicate steals the Defiant and makes an attack on Cardassian territory, in an effort to help the Maquis. Guest starring Jonathan Frakes

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team meets the apparently benign Aschen Confederation, who seem eager to trade technology, but the coordinates of their planet coincide with those that Jacks counterpart from the future warned to avoid. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla is haunted by recurring nightmares, which lead her to discover she is a descendant of one of several humans who were subjected to genetic experiments by the Wraith many centuries ago

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While investigating the destruction of a Federation starship, the Enterprises computer system is paralysed by a mysterious virus, leaving the crew stranded in the Neutral Zone at the mercy of a dangerous Romulan vessel. Patrick Stewart stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew encounters an alien race renowned for their hospitality and interstellar travel technology. Captain Janeway believes their hosts can help them return to their own sector of space, but a friendly meeting between the two sides soon becomes a war of words

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.sub-title: The Mum Who Never Came Home
programme.desc: After mum Michelle Gunshon disappeared, police found CCTV footage showing her with a mystery man. They managed to track him down, but where was she?

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: When mum of three Eileen Jawczak was murdered, clues were minimal. Could police link her death to the Rochdale Ripper?

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The ship becomes stranded in a Romulan minefield, forcing Reed to attempt a risky operation. Fifth sci-fi series in the Star Trek saga, starring Scott Bakula and Dominic Keating

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-dashboard documentary showcasing outrageous road disasters, captured in video form by drivers in-vehicle dashboard cameras

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police officers in Lincolnshire as they tackle crime

programme.title: Night Cops
programme.desc: The Chief Constable of north Wales deals with a drunken man who is being aggressive, while Exmouth police officers strike it lucky when they arrest two drug dealers

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An evening drive becomes a sobering experience for one driver and a man struggles to correctly carry out a drugs test

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Bystanders call out police to deal with an erratic driver, an unlicensed driver tries to push his luck and a man is fined on the way home from the store

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Following the work of New Zealand customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the countrys borders

programme.title: Arabian Seas
programme.desc: As the scorching sun creates huge algae growth, thousands of species swarm in to feast. While food is plentiful, they are not in the mood to share

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The beauty of Ireland, a land small in size but great in wonder, looking at impressing sights including the Cliffs of Moher, shaped and reshaped by giant natural forces

programme.title: Evolution Earth
programme.desc: Nature documentary, revealing how animals are adapting and evolving to the changing planet. Following stories of animals, such as humpback whales and chimpanzees

programme.title: Tales from Zambia
programme.sub-title: Life and Death on the Plains
programme.desc: The Liuwa Plains are one of Africas last wild places - vast and remote grasslands where only the continents toughest wildlife can survive

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The world-famous Maldives face an uncertain future, as rising sea levels threaten to wipe out this tiny island nation. This documentary asks what can be done

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: The topsy-turvy world of emus, in which females call the shots, eggs are green and males do all the work when it comes to raising the young

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Vancouver Island, the wettest place in North America, a primitive habitat where the Pacific Ocean holds the key to life, and where nature and the human spirit co-exist

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Documentary following daily life at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset, where staff look after monkeys, chimps, orangutans and other primates

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: The Carpathian Mountains stretch across seven European countries. Vast primeval forests, steep gorges and isolated peaks offer a vital refuge to some of the continents most charismatic creatures. The opening instalment of this two-part documentary takes place in the summer months. A mother brown bear struggles to find food for her two cubs before the winter arrives. A pair of lynx kittens venture away from their den and honeybees pollinate flowers

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.desc: A look at the blockbusting fantasy comedies, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones and more

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick is seemingly killed by Baron Samedi, and his friends brave the zombie outbreak across Portland to recover his body. However, the occult detective soon rises from the grave. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Myka and Pete question their relationship following an encounter with two secret service agents, while Artie tries to show Claudia the truth about her sister

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Steve search for a dangerous artefact at a Renaissance fair, while Claudia takes a risk to revive her sister from a coma. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock, Joanne Kelly and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick rescues Michonne from a horde of walkers outside the prison, and brings her to safety. However, his fellow survivors are unsure whether she is trustworthy, until she reveals the reason for her visit. Meanwhile, in Woodbury, the Governor employs increasingly brutal means to squeeze information from captives Glenn and Maggie. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Danai Gurira

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Kenny and Ellis make a grisly discovery out in the forest, while Boyd struggles with the reality of what is happening to him

programme.title: The Swarm
programme.desc: Anawak and Crowe focus on communication, while Roches suggestion causes friction on the ship. In a desperate situation, Charlie makes a radical decision

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team explore a secret nuclear bunker in Nantwich, Cheshire, which is the subject of stories about murder and ghosts

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.sub-title: What You Leave Behind - Part Two

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton visits Gigha and Jura, two islands of the Inner Hebrides that are only a few miles apart but could not be more different. He begins at the Achamore Gardens on Gigha, which were created in the 1930s by the malted-drink millionaire James Horlick. He loved Gighas mild climate so much that he bought the island and made it his home. Today Gigha is owned by the community, and many of its residents are incomers attracted by the opportunity to begin a new island life on this small and fertile place. Where Gigha is small, lush and verdant, Jura is rugged and awe-inspiring. Despite being one of Scotlands largest islands, just 200 people live there - alongside more than 5,000 deer

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis of Faith and Octopus Aliens

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard faces the difficult decision of choosing between his relationship with Priya and his friendship with Penny, while Sheldon is irritated by one of Howards magic tricks. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is distraught when his online gaming account is hacked, so his friends decide to find out who is responsible. However, they make the disastrous mistake of confronting the culprit in person. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Sheldon start a gossip experiment to see how quickly rumours spread among the gang, while Howard tells his friends he is planning to propose to Bernadette - not realising Raj is wrestling with his own feelings for her. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is infuriated when Priya uses her legal knowledge to find a loophole in the room-mate agreement - but his spirits are lifted by a night on the town with Amy, Penny and Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldons fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldons new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonards reaction confirms her worst fears. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Mike and Molly

programme.title: Mike and Molly

programme.title: Mike and Molly

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleagues wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldons mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus decides to bring in some sheep in order to produce his favourite meat - lamb. A trip to his native Lancashire introduces him to the amazing Lonk sheep, famed for their delicious meat. Back at the smallholding, while waiting for his new sheep to arrive, he learns about growing ones own spices from chilli enthusiast Mothin and batches up some tomato sauce to share at the local food bank. Once his sheep have arrived, he cooks up a meaty feast for the people who have helped him along the way

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The islands commerce minister is shot dead in his home, and with the incident coming shortly after the exposure of a scandalous affair - not to mention a suicide note at the scene - it looks like an open-and-shut case. But Humphrey isnt convinced and believes someone else was responsible for the killing, whittling down the possible suspects to leave his betrayed wife, his son and his mistress in the frame. The rest of the team struggles to see past the physical evidence, which still suggests he took his own life - and then matters are complicated even further when Camille gets a blast from the past

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A scientist contacts Jane for help after being exposed to a deadly virus, leaving her with only a short time to live. He rushes to the facility where she works and compiles a list of possible suspects, including her husband - but later discovers the security systems have been tampered with, letting anyone enter the lab. It then emerges that a flask containing the toxin has been emptied in the staff room, threatening the entire team. Crime drama, guest starring Tony Curran (This Life)

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: The career of a vitriolic chef is on the line when a severed finger is found in his Beef Wellington. Charlie and Rex investigate his personal and professional rivals

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa and Will infiltrate an exclusive country club, filled with wealthy widows, where a man was incinerated in a hyperbaric chamber at its wellness centre

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A birdwatcher is stabbed to death with his own knife, a case that holds a certain fascination for Humphrey, who was a keen twitcher in his youth. The victim was one of a group of enthusiasts who had visited the island for a glimpse of a famous parrot - but the team soon faces a conundrum as all the suspects were in full sight of one another when the crime was committed. As the cops search for answers, they uncover evidence of long-standing rivalries, secret jealousies and romantic entanglements. But would any of it justify killing a harmless ornithologist?

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Murder on the Day of the Dead
programme.desc: It seems somebody has taken the islands Day of the Dead celebrations a little too literally when a man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked. When she turns up dead, suspicion falls upon her friends and acquaintances at the nearby yacht club - her husband Finn, club secretary Charlotte and chairman Hugh. However, Jacks curiosity is piqued by a yellow butterfly found on the victims clothing and he calls upon Commissioner Selwyns knowledge of such matters. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring John Sessions and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Sullivan pays Father Brown a visit to warn him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a series of brutal murders. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams, with John Light

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A birdwatcher is stabbed to death with his own knife, a case that holds a certain fascination for Humphrey, who was a keen twitcher in his youth. The victim was one of a group of enthusiasts who had visited the island for a glimpse of a famous parrot - but the team soon faces a conundrum as all the suspects were in full sight of one another when the crime was committed. As the cops search for answers, they uncover evidence of long-standing rivalries, secret jealousies and romantic entanglements. But would any of it justify killing a harmless ornithologist?

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A scientist contacts Jane for help after being exposed to a deadly virus, leaving her with only a short time to live. He rushes to the facility where she works and compiles a list of possible suspects, including her husband - but later discovers the security systems have been tampered with, letting anyone enter the lab. It then emerges that a flask containing the toxin has been emptied in the staff room, threatening the entire team. Crime drama, guest starring Tony Curran (This Life)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guests Dara O Briain, Denise Van Outen, Rhod Gilbert and Vernon Kay, who try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig gets vocal with Ed Byrne, Jimmy Carr, Judi Love and Alan Davies

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to help make sense of bewildering times as he dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him this evening are Sara Pascoe, Miles Jupp and Kiri Pritchard-McLean

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade tests a range of products designed to make DIY home decorating and domestic maintenance stress-free activities. He makes use of robot lawnmowers, the worlds safest saw, an automatic wallpapering machine and the latest generation of 3D printers that take just seconds to produce plates and cutlery, before setting himself the challenge of giving a room a makeover without lifting a finger

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: In Progreso, a 20-year-old woman is caught smuggling pills. In Laredo, 500kg of marijuana is found hidden inside a consignment of household goods

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Meth is found inside a truck drivers speakers, a Mexican boy claiming US citizenship is questioned, and AC units containing drugs are intercepted

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Luke and his team are contracted to remove two stolen vehicles from an abandoned mine site that has been turned into a recreational lake for weekend campers and water skiers. The missing cars are toxic and they have a 15,000-dollar budget and two days to get the job done

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets a professional forager who takes him on a tour around the beautiful Camel Estuary. Inspired, the chef creates his version of a Greek Horta pie with foraged greens

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Special police task forces tackle violent drug dealers in Gloucestershire, a fraudster in London, and a cruel gang making money illegally trading over two hundred wild birds from a pub

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Surrey police investigate drug dealers, farmers in Northamptonshire are targeted by a gang in the countryside and a crime squad in Kent investigate local burglaries

programme.title: Guy Martins Spitfire
programme.desc: In May 1940, a Mark 1 Spitfire was shot down and crash-landed on a beach in northern France, where it slowly sank into the sand. The wreckage was finally recovered in the 1980s and stored in France for more than 20 years. In this programme, motorcycle racer and mechanic Guy Martin joins a two-year project to rebuild the aeroplane, revealing the engineering and skills involved, and providing a fitting homage to the bravery of everyone involved in its service

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness introduces Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff to his latest creation - an all-electric, all-terrain ice-cream van for the 21st century. The team also tests the battery-powered Honda E, Vauxhall Corsa-e and Mini Electric with a race around a deserted Alton Towers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness head to the Lake District for an emotional reunion with their own dads old cars. Elsewhere, Chris heads out on track to test Lamborghinis most powerful car ever, the hybrid Sian

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers go in search of three mothers who enjoy cooking and eating outdoors. They sample a Spanish familys al fresco feast, featuring tortilla, garlic prawns and meatballs, and meet a brother and sister whose Hungarian roots provide inspiration for huge picnics. Along the way, they rustle up potted beef and salmon, as well as minced beef pinwheels, and take part in a sushi challenge

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets a professional forager who takes him on a tour around the beautiful Camel Estuary. Inspired, the chef creates his version of a Greek Horta pie with foraged greens

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef joins a team diving for razor clams, which he takes back to the kitchen to make a quick and tasty dish of grilled shangurro clams. In the Penlee Museum, Rick is shown some of the beautiful items made a century ago by fishermen using Cornish copper, and meets a metalworker who is bringing such wares back to the town

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Charles Dance, Stephen Mangan, Isy Suttie and Gok Wan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Olympic long jump champion Greg Rutherford, broadcaster Kirsty Young, actress-writer Joanna Scanlan and comedian Henning Wehn join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Mina Anwar, Glen Moore, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Shaun Williamson test their general knowledge skills on their penultimate day of head-scratchers

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig gets vocal with Ed Byrne, Jimmy Carr, Judi Love and Alan Davies

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Jo Brand hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with Reginald D Hunter and Charlene White joining Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the weeks events

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him in an attempt to make sense of the world around them are Sara Pascoe, Sophie Duker, Jamali Maddix, Jen Brister and Dane Baptiste

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and regular panellist Hugh Dennis look back on another eventful week in news and politics, with the help of fellow comedians Ed Byrne, Rhys James, Nish Kumar, Tiff Stevenson and Tom Allen. As usual, the contestants engage in various rounds of topical stand-up and improvisation as they try to get one up on each other

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian and writer David Baddiel, former MP and Strictly Come Dancing 2016 star Ed Balls, stand-up and actress Jo Brand and ex-Pussycat Doll and Celebrity MasterChef 2015 winner Kimberly Wyatt join host Rob Brydon and captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Charles Dance, Stephen Mangan, Isy Suttie and Gok Wan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him in an attempt to make sense of the world around them are Sara Pascoe, Sophie Duker, Jamali Maddix, Jen Brister and Dane Baptiste

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: In an edition focusing on the worlds smallest gadgets, Richard Ayoade visits musician Alex James at his farm to demonstrate how to swap large appliances for tiny alternatives, and creates a compact house of five interchangeable rooms, before inviting comedian Jimmy Carr for a tour. He also shows Michelin-starred chef Galton Blackiston a device that can prepare a three-course meal entirely on its own

programme.desc: Special police task forces tackle violent drug dealers in Gloucestershire, a fraudster in London, and a cruel gang making money illegally trading over two hundred wild birds from a pub

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Surrey police investigate drug dealers, farmers in Northamptonshire are targeted by a gang in the countryside and a crime squad in Kent investigate local burglaries

programme.title: Guy Martins Spitfire
programme.desc: In May 1940, a Mark 1 Spitfire was shot down and crash-landed on a beach in northern France, where it slowly sank into the sand. The wreckage was finally recovered in the 1980s and stored in France for more than 20 years. In this programme, motorcycle racer and mechanic Guy Martin joins a two-year project to rebuild the aeroplane, revealing the engineering and skills involved, and providing a fitting homage to the bravery of everyone involved in its service

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness introduces Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff to his latest creation - an all-electric, all-terrain ice-cream van for the 21st century. The team also tests the battery-powered Honda E, Vauxhall Corsa-e and Mini Electric with a race around a deserted Alton Towers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness head to the Lake District for an emotional reunion with their own dads old cars. Elsewhere, Chris heads out on track to test Lamborghinis most powerful car ever, the hybrid Sian

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers go in search of three mothers who enjoy cooking and eating outdoors. Along the way, they rustle up potted beef and salmon, as well as minced beef pinwheels, and take part in a sushi challenge

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy are strong-armed into organising a Christmas variety show to raise money for their childrens school. However, things prove to be far from plain sailing, as quality acts are worryingly thin on the ground and an animal impersonator as the only confirmed performer. Who can the duo turn to - surely not Toby and uptight wife Anna? With raw egg-juggling and some knife throwing for good measure, what could possibly go wrong - especially in a live instalment of this award-winning sitcom from 2018? programme.desc: Joe has a frantic day covering Melodys house calls and gets caught up in family politics when a father who needs a new kidney refuses to let his teenage daughter sacrifice her kick-boxing dream by becoming the donor. programme.desc: Medical drama series charting life on the wards of Holby City Hospital. The casts of Casualty and Holby City unite for this action-packed special which sees the emergency and surgical staff thrown together when a fuel tanker crashes into the hospital

programme.desc: Mads comes face to face with the taxi driver who assaulted her, but his increasingly threatening behaviour deters her from reporting the attack. programme.desc: Stacey reels from the news that Ryan kissed her for a bet. Wandering around the Square in shock, she ends up in the park, where she doubles over in pain

programme.desc: Siegfried takes matters into his own hands when he discovers who shot war veteran Jacob Pearsons dog, and a farmer is found to be sneaking his cows onto a neighbouring property to enjoy better grazing. Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy star

programme.desc: Blake is called to Patrick Tynemans shoe factory, where a migrant worker has died in what initially appeared to be an industrial accident. However, when the maverick doctor looks closely at the politics and relationships within the workforce, he begins to suspect foul play. Australian detective drama set in 1959, starring Craig McLachlan

programme.desc: The die-hard dame of the Wainthropp Detective Agency sets about flushing out a missing company director who is sought by his creditors. Back at home, Hettys interfering brother-in-law Frank has come to stay and Robert has flown off to Australia to visit their son Derek

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon decides to give the cafe a new image and cut all connections with the Greek community - but the radical changes dont have the desired effect. Comedy, with Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.desc: Mattie investigates a robbery with clues reminiscent of her own mothers disappearance - and then Jane finds a body and the case becomes a murder.

programme.desc: A recent rape is linked to two similar attacks at a chocolate factory 10 years previously, leaving the team with no choice but to reopen all three cases. After a visit to the doctor, Gerry decides to quit smoking, and instead of resorting to nicotine patches or gum, he enlists Sandra to help him quit

programme.desc: A hurtful remark from Chris sends Tracey on a diet, while Dorien takes a new interest in fitness when she gets a handsome personal trainer

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Nick meets a flirtatious new patient, while the reported death of a French film star causes a lonely woman to have delusions. Michael McKell stars

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Archie gets trapped in a lift with a pregnant woman and a heavy smoker suffering from emphysema. Michelle takes a shine to Mike, the new agency nurse at the Mill, and discovers he is Archies friend from college

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Rosie is sedated in maternity and wakes up to find she cannot remember the tragic events of the previous week. Wills attitude problem causes trouble in the canteen, leading to another run-in with Connie. Jess tells Sean she is not ready to break the news about the baby to her father - but thats the least of her worries after she goes for a scan

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Linda struggles to gain the teams respect on her first day as clinical-nurse manager, and is mortified when a one-night stand turns up at the hospital with a surprise. Meanwhile, Dylan is apprehensive about returning to work following Pollys death, but a curious case arouses his interest. Starring Christine Tremarco and William Beck

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Eddie Santini is finally summoned to the Old Bailey to stand trial for murder, bringing to a head his bitter confrontation with arch-enemy Rosie Fox. Extended episode of the police drama, starring Michael Higgs and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Tanya tells Max shes moved on, shes in love with another man. And, shes engaged

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Abi is concerned about her dad, playing parent when a hungover Max tries to get his act together. Meanwhile, Liz realises she cant continue her relationship with Patrick

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James is none too happy when Siegfried allows Tricky Woo to stay at Skeldale House after Mrs Pumphrey goes away to France. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A psychiatric nurse is found murdered at the asylum, but the presence of a patient at the scene holding the weapon and confessing is not enough to convince Blake of his guilt. Meanwhile, at home, the doctor continues to hide his grief about the search for his wife and child in Singapore. Detective drama, starring Craig McLachlan

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: DCI Adams investigations into a spate of domestic robberies result in an accusation of sexual harassment against him from a young nurse. Hetty is convinced he has been wrongly accused and investigates the claim from her hospital bed

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A hurtful remark from Chris sends Tracey on a diet, while Dorien takes a new interest in fitness when she gets a handsome personal trainer

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Seymour sets about proving that skiing does not have to be an expensive sport. However, with snow in short supply he determines that he, Compo and Clegg need to use dinner trays. Long-running rural comedy, starring Michael Aldridge, Bill Owen and Peter Sallis

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Day of the Welsh Ferret
programme.desc: Compo has an interesting experience when he loses his ferret as the trio make their way to a friends funeral

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When the Teesdales stop to give Clegg, Compo and Seymour a lift home from their caravanning holiday, Mrs T tries to fight off a feeling of discomfort as it becomes apparent the trio are determined to help park the caravan in their drive. Peter Sallis stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Poor weather plagues Bunty and Mrs McCarthys picnic. Meanwhile, Father Brown must intervene when it appears that a dark spirit has murderous intent

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Tommy urges Frances to go further with her attempts at making Catherines life a misery, and a therapist tries to understand why Catherine attended Tommy Lee Royces mothers funeral. Meanwhile, John begins to sweat when a new body is discovered. Crime drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, James Norton and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: A brewery heiress appears to be the sole witness to the murder of a serial killer - but she was herself presumed dead 19 years previously. Dalziel assumes she is an imposter, until further research uncovers bad blood between the brothers currently running the family business. Detective drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack announces he is quitting the team, but before Sandra, Brian and Gerry can question his reasons, shadowy Whitehall figure Stephen Fisher arrives with one of his secret cases - the unsolved murder of a woman dating back more than 160 years. With just 24 hours to solve it, will the sleuths find time to get to the bottom of Jacks shock decision and persuade him to stick around?

programme.desc: When dancers vanish from Le Coeurs school, Orla and Lola ask Harry to investigate. Harry and Fergus explore the schools past to solve the mystery

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels by train north from Inverness to the Orkney Islands. Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the Cullen Viaduct then enjoys a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. In the factory smokery, he learns from the owner how the famous soup acquires its distinctive taste

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands. He arrives on Britains northernmost railway, the Far North Line, and heads straight onto the water to explore a former oil drilling rig now moored in the firth

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Tynemouth on the first leg of a trip to Berwick-upon-Tweed, hearing about of a 19th-century tragedy at sea that inspired 140 local men to set up a coastal rescue service. At Long Sands beach, Michael rolls up his sleeves to help volunteers caring for sick and injured seals at the Tynemouth Aquarium Seal Hospital

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The return of the documentary, picking up in the immediate aftermath of the Second World War, when the Allies uncovered the scale of the Holocaust. Preparations began for a trial at Nuremberg, where 22 of the highest-ranking Nazis, including Hermann Goering, were to face charges of war crimes and crimes against humanity. But not all the highest-ranking Nazis had been captured, and the job of tracking them down fell to Allied soldiers

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: After the Nuremberg trial, the most senior ranking Nazis had been executed or imprisoned - but many of the worst criminals were still at large. They included Adolf Eichmann, who arranged the transportation of millions of Europes Jewish people to death camps, and Nazi secret police chief Klaus Barbie, who became known as the Butcher of Lyon because of his reputation for extreme cruelty. This documentary follows the hunt for these two war criminals

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. One such woman was German Beate Klarsfeld, determined to right the wrongs of her countrys dark past and identify Nazis who had gone unpunished - including the notorious Klaus Barbie. The documentary also tells the story of Josef Mengele - who performed gruesome experiments on Auschwitz inmates - and the son so appalled by his fathers actions he considered turning him in

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor Meldrew finds himself forced into early retirement, but is determined not to end up on the scrapheap, pouring scorn on the modern world and driving everybody crazy in the process. Richard Wilson stars in the first-ever episode as misery guts Meldrew, with Annette Crosbie as his long-suffering wife. From 1990

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to take Victors mind off his depressing situation by encouraging him to attend a fitness class and read a book on how to cope with old age. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household is disrupted by a pesky plumber whose penchant for morbid practical jokes would try the patience of a saint. Victor decides its time to call a neighbourhood watch system after hes mugged and graffiti is spray painted on the side of the Meldrews house. David Renwicks award-winning comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are trapped in the shed by a swarm of bees - and not unexpectedly where the mishap-prone Meldrews are concerned, that is just the start of their troubles. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.desc: Patricks plans for a quiet birthday with Pippa are left in tatters when the Meldrews join them for a meal at a Chinese restaurant. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Farne Islands to Berwick upon Tweed
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail trek along the coast of Northumberland continues towards the Farne Islands, takes in the holy island of Lindisfarne, and finishes in Englands northernmost town, Berwick-upon-Tweed

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From Britains northernmost station at Thurso in Caithness, Michael Portillo heads for the ferry port of Scrabster to cross the Pentland Firth to the Orkney Islands. Passing the Old Man of Hoy, Michael takes in stunning views of the Orkney archipelago and the rugged coastlines of its 70 islands

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the presenter explores the country that lies at the crossroads between Europe and Asia, and discovers the dramatic changes it is undergoing. The first leg of his journey begins in Istanbul, from which he travels along the Aegean coast to the hostile border with Syria. He meets refugees trying to start a new life and a billionaire taking advantage of a property boom. He moves on into the Taurus Mountains and the Black Sea Coast, and visits a community trying to keep an ancient language alive

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the second half of the journey, Simon travels along the Black Sea Coast to the capital of Ankara and the Northern Highlands, witnessing first hand the aftermath of fighting in Kurdish areas and meeting a conservationist attempting to preserve the regions brown bears. He then returns to Istanbul, where he takes part in a popular TV series set in the palace of the Ottoman Sultans

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouvers opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simons final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

Christmas edition of David Renwicks comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors unease at the possible outcome of a medical test is compounded by the discovery that he has just bought a car with an obscene number plate. programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is invited to talk about evolution at the Womens Institute, and finds plenty of inspiration when he decides to take up fishing. Meanwhile, Pippa is left shattered after a three-week visit by Patricks equally stuffy brother. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: After years of frustrated anger and railing against the system, Victor Meldrew breathes his last I dont believe it after falling victim to a hit-and-run driver. At first, it seems as if the shock of his death will take a long time to settle for long-suffering Margaret

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. One such woman was German Beate Klarsfeld, determined to right the wrongs of her countrys dark past and identify Nazis who had gone unpunished - including the notorious Klaus Barbie. The documentary also tells the story of Josef Mengele - who performed gruesome experiments on Auschwitz inmates - and the son so appalled by his fathers actions he considered turning him in

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The return of the documentary, picking up in the immediate aftermath of the Second World War, when the Allies uncovered the scale of the Holocaust. Preparations began for a trial at Nuremberg, where 22 of the highest-ranking Nazis, including Hermann Goering, were to face charges of war crimes and crimes against humanity. But not all the highest-ranking Nazis had been captured, and the job of tracking them down fell to Allied soldiers

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: After the Nuremberg trial, the most senior ranking Nazis had been executed or imprisoned - but many of the worst criminals were still at large. They included Adolf Eichmann, who arranged the transportation of millions of Europes Jewish people to death camps, and Nazi secret police chief Klaus Barbie, who became known as the Butcher of Lyon because of his reputation for extreme cruelty. This documentary follows the hunt for these two war criminals

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The continuing story of the diehards committed to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals, some of whom were living in plain sight. One such woman was German Beate Klarsfeld, determined to right the wrongs of her countrys dark past and identify Nazis who had gone unpunished - including the notorious Klaus Barbie. The documentary also tells the story of Josef Mengele - who performed gruesome experiments on Auschwitz inmates - and the son so appalled by his fathers actions he considered turning him in

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor Meldrew finds himself forced into early retirement, but is determined not to end up on the scrapheap, pouring scorn on the modern world and driving everybody crazy in the process. Richard Wilson stars in the first-ever episode as misery guts Meldrew, with Annette Crosbie as his long-suffering wife. From 1990

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to take Victors mind off his depressing situation by encouraging him to attend a fitness class and read a book on how to cope with old age. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household is disrupted by a pesky plumber whose penchant for morbid practical jokes would try the patience of a saint. Victor decides its time to call a neighbourhood watch system after hes mugged and graffiti is spray painted on the side of the Meldrews house. David Renwicks award-winning comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are trapped in the shed by a swarm of bees - and not unexpectedly where the mishap-prone Meldrews are concerned, that is just the start of their troubles. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Tynemouth on the first leg of a trip to Berwick-upon-Tweed, hearing about of a 19th-century tragedy at sea that inspired 140 local men to set up a coastal rescue service. At Long Sands beach, Michael rolls up his sleeves to help volunteers caring for sick and injured seals at the Tynemouth Aquarium Seal Hospital

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Farne Islands to Berwick upon Tweed
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail trek along the coast of Northumberland continues towards the Farne Islands, takes in the holy island of Lindisfarne, and finishes in Englands northernmost town, Berwick-upon-Tweed

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From Britains northernmost station at Thurso in Caithness, Michael Portillo heads for the ferry port of Scrabster to cross the Pentland Firth to the Orkney Islands. Passing the Old Man of Hoy, Michael takes in stunning views of the Orkney archipelago and the rugged coastlines of its 70 islands

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the presenter explores the country that lies at the crossroads between Europe and Asia, and discovers the dramatic changes it is undergoing. The first leg of his journey begins in Istanbul, from which he travels along the Aegean coast to the hostile border with Syria. He meets refugees trying to start a new life and a billionaire taking advantage of a property boom. He moves on into the Taurus Mountains and the Black Sea Coast, and visits a community trying to keep an ancient language alive

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the second half of the journey, Simon travels along the Black Sea Coast to the capital of Ankara and the Northern Highlands, witnessing first hand the aftermath of fighting in Kurdish areas and meeting a conservationist attempting to preserve the regions brown bears. He then returns to Istanbul, where he takes part in a popular TV series set in the palace of the Ottoman Sultans

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouvers opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simons final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

Christmas edition of David Renwicks comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors unease at the possible outcome of a medical test is compounded by the discovery that he has just bought a car with an obscene number plate. However, it isnt until later, when he attends an amateur dramatics rehearsal at neighbour Nick Swaineys house, that things really start getting him down. Richard Wilson stars

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor hires a daily to help out around the house, but comes to regret his decision, and a visit to the fish shop unleashes all manner of horrors. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson

programme.desc: A power cut on a sweltering summer night gives Victor and Margaret time to reflect on their lives together and look forward, without enthusiasm, to a visit from their elderly neighbours. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Roy Hudd star

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Miserly shopkeeper Arkwright organises a sales drive in a bid to boost profits - and rid himself of the vast consignment of apples he has mistakenly ordered. An unhappy Granville is persuaded to demonstrate the merchandise. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: A holiday in a small caravan cramps the two couples style as Tony cannot believe Deborah is not faking her enthusiasm for sex, while Dorothy has to put up with Garys moods when he pretends to give up smoking. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tonys incessant witticisms during an episode of Star Trek provoke a plot to humiliate him, which ends up forcing him to hide out in the water tank in the loft. Comedy, starring Neil Morrissey and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Daisy wins a place on TV quiz show Pointless and chooses Lucy as her partner - but changes her mind when Lee convinces the women of his intellectual prowess. The only problem is, he wasnt entirely honest with his friends, and now he has to appear on the programme knowing hes really a bit thick. Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman guest star in the sitcom, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Diane puts her trust in Kath, sending her on a covert mission to Martins office while she reluctantly accompanies her spouse to a dinner party at Sandy Coopers home. In a desperate attempt to address his financial woes, Martin tries to impress Sandy and Vinnie Hayes to secure the treasury job and get his hands on the Rotary Club float. Comedy written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Conleth Hill and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Its the big day for Kath and Diane as they attempt to finally exact their revenge on Martin. However, while Diane has never felt more alive, Kath seems to be having second thoughts. Comedy, written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Rosie Cavaliero, Conleth Hill, Sheila Reid and Steve Pemberton

programme.desc: Martin has trouble sleeping and seems too tense - even by the standards that normally apply to him. Aware that Paul knows some relaxation techniques, Ann asks her neighbour for help. Comedy, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Wilton and Peter Egan

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: A few mysterious goings-on in the shop convince Granville the place is haunted by Arkwright - but the locals refuse to believe him. programme.desc: The residents are troubled by a bicycle, and Compos lucky rabbits foot causes even more problems, while Sid tries his best to avoid Ivy. Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Michael Bates star in the long-running comedy set in Yorkshire, from the pen of Roy Clarke

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isnt long before they have sensed a spooky presence. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix star in this festive special of the sitcom, with Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant. Festive edition from 2013

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as a doting mother-of-six who constantly interferes in her childrens lives. programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville has some outdated Christmas puddings to sell, but needs a clever plan to lure his sceptical customers into buying them. Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom, but luckily Granville discovers Gastric has a hidden dark side with spiritual powers that could solve the mystery and impress Madge. Meanwhile, Mrs Hussein takes a shine to Leroy and wants to know what they keep behind the counter for special customers

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.desc: Martin is overjoyed when Paul announces he is leaving the area as he cannot find suitable premises for his business, but later faces a quandary when he changes upon an available property in the ideal location. Comedy, starring Richard Briers and Peter Egan

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.title: Still Open All Hours

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright attends a former customers funeral, leaving Granville in charge of the store. However, the miserly shopkeeper has difficulty trusting his nephew to run it properly

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a bid to impress Lucy, Lee prepares for a 10km fun run, only to injure himself at the start of his training. The aspiring athlete tries to hide the mishap from his flatmate and gets a secret sports massage, which inevitably leads to more trouble. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy attends a three-day trade conference to drum up business, but when she has little luck she resorts to flirting with the male delegates. Lee is outraged with her plan, however, and in an attempt to stop her he turns up at the event - posing as her husband. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes needs someone to look after Grandad so she can treat herself to a much-needed holiday - but with private nursing homes being so expensive, it seems her only option is to convince the health visitor he has lost his marbles. Rory and Dino move in for a couple of weeks, and the matriarch is soon spitting feathers when the latter begins taking over the house, and her late husband gets in touch from beyond the grave with some ominous news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of how the British sitcom was made, featuring unseen footage of Victoria Wood, and interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: After a recent break-up, Alma tries to get her life back on track, but with no job, no qualifications and a rebellious streak a mile wide, it is not going to be easy. Meanwhile, her heroin-addicted mother has been sectioned for arson, and her grandmother Joan wants nothing to do with it. Comedy pilot, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. To compound their woes, the duo fear the arrival of Dorothys 10-year-old nephew will ruin their efforts to act maturely. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Daisy wins a place on TV quiz show Pointless and chooses Lucy as her partner - but changes her mind when Lee convinces the women of his intellectual prowess. The only problem is, he wasnt entirely honest with his friends, and now he has to appear on the programme knowing hes really a bit thick. Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman guest star in the sitcom, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Diane puts her trust in Kath, sending her on a covert mission to Martins office while she reluctantly accompanies her spouse to a dinner party at Sandy Coopers home. In a desperate attempt to address his financial woes, Martin tries to impress Sandy and Vinnie Hayes to secure the treasury job and get his hands on the Rotary Club float. Comedy written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Conleth Hill and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Its the big day for Kath and Diane as they attempt to finally exact their revenge on Martin. However, while Diane has never felt more alive, Kath seems to be having second thoughts. Comedy, written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Rosie Cavaliero, Conleth Hill, Sheila Reid and Steve Pemberton

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin has trouble sleeping and seems too tense - even by the standards that normally apply to him. Aware that Paul knows some relaxation techniques, Ann asks her neighbour for help. Comedy, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Wilton and Peter Egan

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: A few mysterious goings-on in the shop convince Granville the place is haunted by Arkwright - but the locals refuse to believe him. Thats not the only ghost, however, as a surprise visitor from the past gets the entire street talking. David Jason stars, with a guest appearance from Paula Wilcox

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene spots an opportunity to have her old possessions assessed by experts when the Antiques Roadshow arrives in Ludlow, and the farms staff all share the same idea. However, it turns out that Boycie, with help from Tyler, is the only one to discover a truly valuable item. Fiona Bruce guest stars

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: A visit to America persuades young Mr Grace he has to move with the times, so he introduces a series of innovative sales techniques to the store, but finds the old dogs on the shop floor reluctant to learn new tricks. Comedy, with John Inman, the late Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The residents are troubled by a bicycle, and Compos lucky rabbits foot causes even more problems, while Sid tries his best to avoid Ivy. Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Michael Bates star in the long-running comedy set in Yorkshire, from the pen of Roy Clarke

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos That Dancing with Nora Batty, Then?
programme.desc: Clegg, Compo and Blamire look for a piano to provide the entertainment at Glorias surprise farewell party before she emigrates to Australia. Meanwhile, two new librarians arrive and are bent on keeping the morality of the facility in tact

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isnt long before they have sensed a spooky presence. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix star in this festive special of the sitcom, with Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant. Festive edition from 2013

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its chaos for the junior doctors when the hospital computer system crashes. Zak treats a man who may have had a mini stroke, and Tej deals with two critically ill patients in resus.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey coaches the Smith family through a mammoth declutter as their possessions are laid out in a warehouse as though it were an art installation they discover 207 loose nappies, 145 Punjabi suits and 24 old toothbrushes amongst other things. Things get emotional as Raaj lets go of some of her late sisters belongings whom she lost to Covid. Carpenter Rob works hard to make their three-bedroom house accommodate six people and Dilly creates a brand-new larder while reorganising the kitchen

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Canadian comedian, actor and writer, Katherine Ryan, for a frank and honest conversation about her career, relationships and the changing shape of her family. Louis accompanies Katherine as she performs her latest stand-up tour, Missus, in Southend-On-Sea, and later, he spends a rare day off with Katherine, her daughter Violet and her husband Bobby

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Duxford in Cambridgeshire, where he enlists the help of local tradespeople to assist Paul and Sarah Behan. The couple had started on an extension to their small bungalow when the project had to be abandoned due to their son Joshua being diagnosed with a rare and aggressive form of liver cancer. The team puts in an impressive effort, but with only nine days to finish the job the challenge is extensive

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Maidstone, Kent, to meet former Royal Engineer and paratrooper Mo Morris. After 20 years in the service, he was given a medical discharge due to damage to his knees, and has been left struggling to walk unaided ever since. At present, his home is unsuited to his needs, putting pressure on his relatives as they try to help as best they can. Determined to give him back his independence, the DIY SOS team rallies the local troops, including tradespeople and neighbours, to work together and adapt Mos house, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to make sure everything goes to plan

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of a couple in Halifax, West Yorkshire, whose eight-year-old son is paralysed and can only access two rooms in their house. The family home is in need of a major overhaul but with only nine days to complete the job, the gang needs help - and thats where local tradesmen and other members of the community come in, turning up in force to bring designer Gabrielle Blackmans ideas to life

programme.title: Tipping Point
